_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Blood Glucose is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; base-knowledge.md documents neither Google's wire field name(s) nor which of the two clinically-standard units (US mg/dL vs. mmol/L) it reports. This is the US-conventional mg/dL fixture variant -- WP-11 explicitly asks for both fixture variants rather than inventing a conversion between them. Assumed field name `blood_glucose.mg_per_dl`; the *presence* of this field (rather than `mmol_per_l`, see blood-glucose-mmol.json) is what signals the unit to SyncKit's TypeMapper.decideBloodGlucose -- no separate unit indicator field is assumed. Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.bloodGlucoseMgDLPoint().
